E: Your team just hit a deadline early — what do you do with the spare afternoon?
You are seated next to a quiet colleague at a long training session. How does the time unfold?
O: You inherit a collection of books written in a language you cannot read. What do you do with them?
A friend offers you a ticket to a performance of music you have never heard before. Walk through your evening.
C: You wake up and notice that your daily routine has been disrupted by an unexpected power outage. How do you handle your morning?
You have two weeks of vacation coming up. How do you prepare before you leave?
A: A junior colleague confesses they made a costly mistake on a report before it was submitted. What do you do?
You notice that a neighbour seems to be struggling carrying heavy groceries up the stairs. Walk through how you respond.
N: You discover that a flight you booked has been cancelled with no rescheduled option given yet. How do you respond over the next hour?
A medical check-up result comes back marked as needing a follow-up consultation. Describe the next twenty-four hours.
